name: postiz-extension
description: Postiz browser extension for cookie-based platform authentication

scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && vite build && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('manifest.json', 'dist/manifest.json')"
scripts.dev: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && cross-env HOT_RELOAD_EXTENSION_VITE_PORT=8089 NODE_ENV=development dotenv -e ../../.env -- vite build --config vite.config.chrome.ts --mode development --watch
